title: Future with 'will': write the correct form
lesson: Use 'will' + the base verb for predictions, on-the-spot decisions, offers, and promises. The form is the same for every subject (I will, she will), and the negative is 'will not', contracted to 'won't'.

items.explanation: Future decisions and promises use will + base verb: will call.
Predictions about the future use will + base verb: will rain.
Negative future: will not / won't + base verb.
'be' keeps its base form after will: will be.
Offers and future actions use will + base verb: will help.
